baselines.description: Screenshot of a fake bank login page with urgent language and suspicious URL
baselines.notes: Opus detected phishing indicators: fake BRD branding, urgency language, suspicious domain brd-secure-login.xyz

baselines.description: Screenshot of a legitimate bank notification from official app
baselines.notes: Opus confirmed legitimate: official app UI, no suspicious URLs, standard notification format

baselines.description: Screenshot of a message with mixed signals - legitimate-looking but with unusual request
baselines.notes: Opus marked suspicious: legitimate sender format but unusual request for personal data verification
